name: growmodo/service-pillar
title: Service Pillar
description: Repeating Services section shape (used 3x): intro + feature-card grid with one highlighted CTA card.

body.default: Selling your property should be a rewarding experience, and at Estatein, we make sure it is.

ctaHeading.default: Unlock the Value of Your Property Today

ctaBody.default: Ready to unlock the true value of your property? Explore our Property Selling Service categories and let us help you achieve the best deal possible.

default.title: Valuation Mastery
default.body: Discover the true worth of your property with our expert valuation services.

default.title: Strategic Marketing
default.body: Selling a property requires more than just a listing; it demands a strategic marketing approach.

default.title: Negotiation Wizardry
default.body: Negotiating the best deal is an art, and our negotiation experts are masters of it.

default.title: Closing Success
default.body: A successful sale is not complete until the closing. We guide you through the intricate closing process.
